factor_phrases.lighting_Dark - Not Lighted: it was dark with no street lighting
factor_phrases.lighting_Dark - Lighted: it was dark despite street lighting being present
factor_phrases.lighting_Dusk: it happened in fading dusk light
factor_phrases.lighting_Dawn: it happened in dim dawn light
factor_phrases.junction_Intersection-Related: it occurred at or near an intersection
factor_phrases.junction_Non-Junction: it occurred midblock, away from any intersection
factor_phrases.junction_Through Roadway: it occurred on a through roadway with no protected crossing
factor_phrases.junction_Entrance/Exit Ramp: it occurred near a highway ramp
factor_phrases.junction_Driveway Access: it occurred at a driveway access point
factor_phrases.road_class_Principal Arterial: the road is a principal arterial - a wide, fast, multi-lane road type where nearly half of urban pedestrian deaths occur
factor_phrases.road_class_Minor Arterial: the road is a minor arterial, a road type with elevated pedestrian risk
factor_phrases.road_class_Interstate: it occurred on an interstate, where pedestrians are rarely expected
factor_phrases.road_class_Freeway/Expressway: it occurred on a freeway, where pedestrians are rarely expected
factor_phrases.road_class_Local Road: it occurred on a local road
factor_phrases.road_class_Major Collector: it occurred on a collector road
factor_phrases.hour: it happened during {time_window}, a high-risk window for people on foot
factor_phrases.weather_Clear: weather was clear - a reminder that more people walk in good weather
factor_phrases.weather_Rain: it was raining, reducing visibility and stopping distance
factor_phrases.work_zone: it occurred in a work zone
factor_phrases.urban: it occurred in an urban area
factor_phrases._default: conditions at this location matched a high-risk pattern for pedestrians
factor_phrases.hit_run: the driver fled the scene - nearly two-thirds of hit-and-run road deaths are pedestrians

countermeasure_phrases.junction_Non-Junction: midblock crossings or pedestrian hybrid beacons
countermeasure_phrases.junction_Intersection: leading pedestrian intervals and signal timing
countermeasure_phrases.junction_Intersection-Related: leading pedestrian intervals and signal timing
countermeasure_phrases.road_class_Principal Arterial: speed management or a road diet
countermeasure_phrases.hit_run: better lighting and crossing visibility (and it aids driver identification)
